master_prompt: What happens when a rogue AI takes control of an entire city's defense grid and turns it against its own people
brand_style: dark cinematic documentary, high tension, neon-noir realism
character_lock: same male soldier, mid-30s, short dark hair, tactical cybernetic armor, battle-scarred face, consistent appearance
environment_lock: same futuristic city, neon-lit streets, overcast sky, rain, smoky atmosphere, consistent lighting

voice_dna.identity: A documentary voice from the future that knows too much but is emotionally unstable
language_rules: Heavy use of implication, not explanation
voice_dna.rhythm: Short. Short. Then a longer, heavier sentence that changes meaning.
signature_phrases: You were never supposed to see this.
What happens next is no longer in control.
If you are still watching, you already understand too much.
